name: Brown Rice Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 12-cup casserole, combine the chicken stock, rice, canned tomatoes, carrots, green onions, large onion, celery, garlic, and bay leaf.
2. Cover and microwave at High for 10 minutes or until boiling; stir.
3. Cover and microwave at Medium (50%) for 45-60 minutes or until rice is tender. Stir in the sausages, parsley, oregano, basil, and thyme. Let stand, covered, for 15 minutes. Discard bay leaf.
